PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch "Loopback|VMware|VirtualBox|vEthernet" -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch "^169" } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress)
